productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Solid Purple Tops
description: Composition Purple top made of 100% viscose, has a round neck with a buttoned chest placket that has ruffles, long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, and an elasticated hem that has an embroidered brand logo on the leftFittingRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentLow tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron if requiredYear end's all about vacations and parties. Gear up and slip into the festive mood in style with this ruffled placket top from flying machine. The full sleeves with elasticated cuffs are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while the viscose fabric flatters your silhouette. Pair this top with jeans, stilletto sandals and long earrings.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
